question: This variable attaches a unique identification number to each respondent with year of the module, country/ subsample (V3) and the original identification number of the respondents.
Year of interview: year of interview; YYYY (four digits)
Month of the interview: MM (two digits)
Day of the interview: DD (two digits)

content.0: NAP, no substitution in this survey

question: This variable records the administrative mode/ method of data-collection.

content.13: Face-to-face, PAPI, interpreter or translator, no visuals
content.14: Face-to-face, PAPI, interpreter or translator, visuals
content.20: CAPI, computer assisted personal interview, no visuals
content.21: CAPI, computer assisted personal interview, visuals
content.22: CAPI, respondent reading questionnaire (paper or on monitor)
content.23: CAPI, interpreter or translator, no visuals
content.30: Self completion, arrives with interviewer, interviewer attending
content.31: Self completion, arrives with interviewer, drops-off, picks up later
content.32: Self completion, arrives with interviewer, drops-off, mailed back by Respondent
content.33: Self completion, mailed to, completed by R and hold for pick up
content.34: Self completion, mailed to, mailed back by Respondent

meaning: Methods of data-collection in mixed modes experiment
question: The variable 'GROUP' functions as a flag variable to show the participation in the experiment and to distinguish web respondents from 'standard mode' respondents.

content.0: Not available, country did not participate in 'Mixed Mode Experiment'
